documentation.value: Optional `LoggingLevel` enum value (ERROR, WARN, INFO, DEBUG, FINE, FINER, FINEST).
The object or string to write to the debug log.
The object to convert to a String.

Constructs a Date from integer year, month, and day values.
```apex
Date d = Date.newInstance(2024, 1, 15);
```
The year component (Integer).
The month component, 1-12 (Integer).
The day component (Integer).

Returns the larger of two values.
```apex
Decimal result = Math.max(10, 20); // 20
```
First numeric value (Decimal, Double, Integer, or Long).
Second numeric value.
The element to add to the list.
The key with which the value is to be associated.
The value to be associated with the key.

Executes a dynamic SOQL query and returns a list of sObjects.
```apex
List<Account> accts = Database.query('SELECT Id, Name FROM Account LIMIT 10');
```
A valid SOQL query string.

Returns a string with the arguments substituted into the template.
```apex
String msg = String.format('Hello {0}, you have {1} items', new List<String>{'Alice', '5'});
```
A template string with `{0}`, `{1}`, etc. placeholders.
A `List<String>` of substitution values.
The Apex object to serialize.

Deserializes a JSON string into an Apex object of the specified type.
```apex
Account a = (Account) JSON.deserialize(jsonStr, Account.class);
```
The JSON string to deserialize.
The Apex type to deserialize into (e.g. `Account.class`).
